mapper.insert:
insert into `boll` ( `code`, `date`, `type`, `md`, `mb`, `up`, `dn`, `create_time`, `update_time`) values
(#{item.code}, #{item.date}, #{item.type}, #{item.md}, #{item.mb}, #{item.up}, #{item.dn}, now(), now())
on duplicate key update `md` = values(md), `mb` = values(mb), `up` = values(up), `dn` = values(dn), `update_time` = now()
